headline: Barclays Upgrades IQVIA Holdings to Overweight, Maintains Price Target to $210
summary: Barclays  analyst Luke Sergott   upgrades IQVIA Holdings (NYSE:IQV) from Equal-Weight to Overweight and maintains the price target from $210 to $210.

raw.headline: Barclays Upgrades IQVIA Holdings to Overweight, Maintains Price Target to $210
